title: Using command line arguments is security-sensitive
description: Using command line arguments is security-sensitive. It has led in the past to the following vulnerabilities: Command line arguments can be dangerous just like any other user input. They should never be used without being first validated and sanitized.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.
